title:
Road works and Closures between Kawerau B.o.p and Christchurch  nz
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Road works and Closures between Kawerau B.o.p and Christchurch  nz
Roadworks and road closures any up to date delays.
Unrestricted safe and relaxing car and boat travel to Christchurch from Kawerau nz.
Having having the knowledge to understand the delays that are ahead of travel.

### Response from Bay of Plenty Regional Council
Status Data not available for release
Comments Dear Sir / Madam, 

Thank you for your request for information dated 3rd February 2025, (received via Regional Council’s Web Info Requests email on 3rd February 2025. 
 
Bay of Plenty Regional Council / Toi Moana is a local government entity that monitors the effects of human activity on the environment; and promotes the sustainable management of natural and physical resources of the Bay of Plenty region for present and future generations.  
The major focus of our work includes freshwater, land, air and coastal waters. The Council also has broader responsibility with others for the economic, social and cultural well-being of the regional community. 
  
Regional Council does not manage or hold information you have requested about (Roadworks and Closures) Thereby, we are unable to provide the information and refuse your request on the basis of section 17(e) of the Local Government Official Information & Meetings Act 1987 (LGOIMA) because documents alleged to contain information do not exist with us or, despite reasonable efforts to locate it, cannot be found. 
  
Please note that if you are not satisfied with Regional Council’s response to your request, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Ombudsman under section 27(3) of LGOIMA. The Ombudsman’s Office can be contacted by calling 0800 802 602, emailing info@ombudsman.parliament.nz or online at http://www.ombudsman.parliament.nz

Ngā Mihi │ Kind regards,
Carol Flynn
Information Advisor
Bay of Plenty Regional Council Toi Moana

#### Likely Source Agency
Bay of Plenty Regional Council
